ab: a ngadan na ku kama ti camak.
a ngadan na ku kina ti savan.
izua ku kaka tjavulung a uqaljay, a ngadan nimadju ti buka, tucu puluq sa ita anga cavilj nimadju.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫buka，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is buka, he is 11 years old.

ab: kitulutulu amen itau mamaw a gaku.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: tjengelay semenay ken kata tjavulung a kaka uqaljay.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: tjengelay ken a kemavekav, nu pulavay, tiamen taqumaqanan maciuciul vaik a kemavekav.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: tjengelay ken sekeljang tua atalasi a qali, dikilu amen maciul a semenay kata kemavekav.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
